#  Share Drawings Within Procore (iOS) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Standard' or 'Admin' permissions on the Drawings tool.
  * **Additional Information** :
    * In order to receive push notifications from Procore on an iOS device, users must have notifications enabled within the Procore app, and for the iOS device. See [Enable Push Notifications for Drawings (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/enable-push-notifications-for-drawings-ios) and [Manage Project Settings (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/getting-started-procore-app-ios/manage-project-settings).   
_Note:_ An email notification with a link to view the drawing will also be sent to the users.


##  Steps 
  1. Open the **Procore** app on an iOS mobile device.
  2. Tap the project's **Drawings** tool.
  3. Tap the **share** ![Icon Share 2 Ios](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/94e63779c03441f497fd2cb0efab2497/b30002c5ec90f86de496464e35c70b16/icon-share-2-ios.png?fm=webp&h=18) icon.   
  
![Drawings Ios Share Drawings](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/882f81c63c38532428dfd4c20112ea34/4091857e866c4a3fc1ee2429eb357146/drawings-ios-share-drawings.png?fm=webp)  

  4. Tap **Share Within Procore**.
  5. Select one or more contacts to share the drawing with.
  6. Click **Share**.  
An email notification with a link to view the drawing will be sent to the users. Users with push notifications enabled for the Procore app will also receive a notification on their iOS mobile device. See [Enable Push Notifications for Drawings (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/enable-push-notifications-for-drawings-ios) and [Settings: Procore iOS App](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/getting-started-procore-app-ios/app-preferences).


## See Also
  * [Drawings (iOS) - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/permissions)
  * [Share a Snapshot of a Drawing Comparison (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/share-a-snapshot-of-a-drawing-comparison-ios)
  * [View Drawing Area (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/view-drawing-area-ios)
title: Share Drawings Within Procore (iOS)
description: How to share drawings with other users in the Procore iOS app.
